provider_info.description: The information provided to Synctera that triggered this alert, as an arbitrary JSON object. Interpretation of this object is up to the client.

provider_subject_id.description: The id of the provider subject for this alert

provider_subscription_id.description: The id of the provider subscription for this alert

provider_watchlist_name.description: The name of the provider for this alert

urls.description: Where to get more information about this alert (according to our third-party data provider).
